insight: Master Bot is noted to be reasonably good at red rushing strategies, making it harder to beat with aggressive red-based openings compared to other approaches.
author: totally_not_fbi
context: A player mentioned struggling to beat Master Bot after many attempts, and totally_not_fbi commented that Master Bot is kinda good at red rushing.

insight: Including Venge Cannon in the set makes the Kappa challenge (a Master Bot variant challenge) very easy to beat, suggesting Master Bot struggles to handle Venge Cannon effectively in that context.
author: awaclus
context: awaclus made an offhand remark while p0lari mentioned Arkanishu playing 1-second Master Bot games, implying Venge Cannon trivializes the Kappa challenge against the bot.
